name: theory-first
description: Evidence closure, preregistration, and adversarial claim testing for computational science.

interface.longDescription: Close load-bearing literature gaps, read decisive sources deeply, preregister claims before code, and try to falsify results before they propagate.
defaultPrompt: Ground this experiment with $theory-first before implementation.
Challenge this result with $theory-fix before it propagates.
Inspect this source with $deep-read-paper at equation-level fidelity.
